title: ammoides verticillata var. pusilla
intro: Ammoides verticillata var. pusilla, also known as dwarf desert heliotrope or dwarf heliotrope, is a small perennial plant in the carrot family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Ammoides verticillata var. pusilla include treating urinary issues, such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections, as well as reducing inflammation and improving overall cardiovascular health. Ammoides verticillata var. pusilla can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
